g.text: S. H. Butcher and Andrew Lang (1879) — Native target-as-hyperedge visualization

text.style: font-size: 11px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #475569

g.text: Readable weighted core: 34 of 133 attribute nodes; 10 of 90 target hyperedges; 202 of 1017 incidences.

text.style: font-size: 9px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #475569

g.text: Attribute circles and target hyperedges use the colors specified in config/visualizations.json.
